---
sitemap: false
---
# Demi Yilmaz

> Personal essay site of Demi Yilmaz, cofounder of Colonist.io (https://colonist.io). Short essays on mental models, work, communication, health, and family. Lean and contrarian — every sentence pays its rent.

The site at https://demiculus.com is a Jekyll-based blog. Essays are intentionally short — most under 500 words. The voice is direct: no hedging, no "I think", no filler. Topics range across thinking tools, remote work, writing, parenting, ADHD, diet, and growing up.

Demi has also open-sourced a mental model practice list at https://mmpractices.com.

## Essays

{% for essay in site.data.essays %}{% assign target_url = "/" | append: essay.slug | append: "/" %}{% assign p = site.pages | where: "url", target_url | first %}- [{{ essay.title }}]({{ site.url }}{{ target_url }}){% if p.description %}: {{ p.description }}{% endif %}
{% endfor %}
## Pages

- [Home]({{ site.url }}/): Recent essays and short bio.
- [About]({{ site.url }}/about/): Background, games played, books read.
- [All essays]({{ site.url }}/essays/): Full essay index.
- [Resume]({{ site.url }}/resume/): Work history.

## Optional

- [RSS feed]({{ site.url }}/feed.xml): Subscribe to new essays.
